announcement.text: Temple Construction is going to start! You can help by this link: माता काली धाम की शुरुआत

home.description: An ancient sanctuary of devotion and miracles. Experience the divine presence of Maa Kali in a peaceful, spiritual haven.
home.campaign_subtitle: Every single rupee brings us closer to the divine abode.
home.story_p1: For generations, the ancient chabutara of Maa Kali has been a center of undeniable faith and miracles. However, the ravages of time have left the historically important structure unsafe and the sacred idols broken.
home.story_p2: The Mata Kali Sadanand Sadbhavana Trust has taken the pledge to preserve our spiritual heritage. With your support, we aim to rebuild a majestic temple that stands as a beacon of devotion, peace, and culture.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Our Trust
about.history_title: Mission: Mata Kali Dham Temple Construction – A Holy Resolve
about.history_p1: The holy Dham of Mata Kali has been the identity of faith, tradition, and Sanatan culture of the Kaudhiyara region in Prayagraj. This is the place where for generations devotees have been coming with their wishes, where our ancestors worshipped, and where our religious consciousness remained alive.
about.history_p2: Today it is with sadness that we have to say that this holy court of Mata Ji has reached a dilapidated state. The idols of the temple are broken, it is open and unsafe, and there is a lack of management. Modern houses have been built all around, but Mata Ji's court is still incomplete and neglected today.
about.history_p3: This will not only be a construction of bricks and stones but a reconstruction of faith, culture, and identity, and it is our resolve that Mata Kali Dham should be developed as a beautiful, grand, and divine temple—which becomes an inspiration and example for all the surrounding villages.
about.history_p4: This temple will be a symbol of our ancient Sanatan culture, tradition, and the heritage of our ancestors. A clean, safe, and spiritual environment will be created here for the devotees, where bhandara, kanya pujan, sant sewa, and religious events can be held regularly.
about.history_p5: Years ago, with the inspiration and cooperation of all of you, this holy place was electrified and the abode of Mata Ji was illuminated. At that time too, you all had together proved that the blessings of Mata Kali remain on all of us.
about.mission_text: To reconstruct a grand, magnificent, and structurally sound temple that celebrates the fierce yet motherly aspects of Goddess Kali. We endeavor to create a sanctuary where heritage is preserved and devotees find absolute spiritual peace.
about.vision_text: Transform Mata Kali Dham into a leading spiritual and cultural center in the Kaudhiyara region. We aim to support community well-being, facilitate religious education, and uplift the local society through the grace of the Divine Mother.

achievements.title: Our
achievements.subtitle: Achievements
achievements.ach_2026: On 21 January 2026, a community food distribution and Bhandara was organized for pilgrims during the Maghmela at Prayagraj. Free meals and prasad were served to a large number of devotees and Sant as a part of religious service and community support. We also organize Kanya Puja and Sant samman samaroh at Mauni Baba Ashram Magh Mela 2026.
achievements.bp_2026: Service was conducted with proper cleanliness, discipline and the support of volunteers. Special attention was given to food quality, hygiene and respectful service to all pilgrims without discrimination.
achievements.ach_2025: Successfully organized multiple religious awareness programs ram name sankirtan, community welfare activities, successfully conducted community bhandara event, providing free meals to devotees.
achievements.bp_2025: We follow a transparent and well organized approach during Bhandara event ensuring quality food.
